client.state.description: State code used for state-specific clauses and execution rules.

client.street_address.description: Client's street address for incapacity documents.

client.signing_county.description: County used in execution and notary blocks.

client.date_of_birth.description: Client date of birth for HIPAA authorization.

client.pronoun_subject.description: Subject pronoun for execution acknowledgments, such as she, he, or they.

client.pronoun_possessive.description: Possessive pronoun, such as her, his, or their.

client.county.description: County of residence or execution context.

spouse.exists.description: Whether the client has a spouse.

children[].minor.description: Whether a child is a minor.

fiduciaries.agent.primary.full_name.description: Primary agent under durable power of attorney.

guardians.primary.full_name.description: Primary guardian nominee when minor children exist.

healthcare.agent.primary.relationship.description: Relationship of primary health care agent.

healthcare.agent.primary.address.description: Address of primary health care agent.

healthcare.agent.primary.phone.description: Phone number of primary health care agent.

execution.doc_date.description: Document date for execution blocks when signing is scheduled; otherwise a blank date line is rendered.

execution.signing_scheduled.description: Whether a signing date, signing county, and notary commission expiration are known.

execution.signing_county.description: Signing county when signing is scheduled; falls back to client.signing_county when present.

execution.ordinal_doc_date.description: Ordinal execution date phrase, such as the 21st day of May, 2026.

specific_gifts[].description: Specific gifts of property or cash.

charitable_gifts[].description: Charitable gifts included in the plan.

trust.date.description: Date of the trust agreement, formatted as Month Day, Year when known.

trust.display_date.description: Generated display value for the trust date; renders a blank date line when trust.date is unknown.

trust.disinherited[].description: Persons specifically disinherited by the trust.

trust.blended_family.client_children[].description: Children of the client grantor treated as children of both grantors in a joint trust.

trust.blended_family.spouse_children[].description: Children of the spouse grantor treated as children of both grantors in a joint trust.

trust.contingent_beneficiary.full_name.description: Contingent beneficiary for the residuary trust fund if no descendant survives.

trust.tangible_personal_property.distrib.description: Tangible personal property method, such as equal_shares or priority_order.

trust.tangible_personal_property.benefic.description: Named beneficiaries for equal-share tangible personal property distribution.

trust.tangible_personal_property.priorit.description: Priority-order beneficiaries for tangible personal property distribution.

trust.descendants_distribution.method.description: Descendant distribution method, such as outright or staged.

trust.descendants_distribution.distribut.description: Age for outright descendant distribution if retained in trust until a stated age.

fiduciaries.trustee.successor.full_name.description: Second successor trustee for the individual single revocable trust.

fiduciaries.trustee.second_successor.ful.description: Third successor trustee for the individual single revocable trust.

fiduciaries.trustee.co_trustees_action.description: Whether co-trustees at the same level act jointly or independently.

execution.id_type.description: Identification evidence used in the notarial acknowledgment.
